name: Handle Shrine
description: Candles gutter beside dead access cards and spray-painted handles that the living still say under their breath.
detail: The shrine sits under the relay spill where grief, superstition, and packet noise can all pretend to be one thing.

fixtures.name: handle wall
fixtures.inspect: Hundreds of dead handles stare back from cards, tags, and resin-sealed slips of thermal paper.

fixtures.name: candle shelf
fixtures.inspect: The candle shelf is made from an old rack switch. It still smells faintly of ozone under the wax.

mood: The candles are guttering on a draught that does not match the wind outside.
Tonight one card on the wall has a fresh thumbprint over a name that is supposed to be three years dead.
A booth speaker somewhere is bleeding the choir channel into the shrine air; Widow Byte has not turned it off.

scavenge.note: You search the shrine carefully enough not to insult the dead or the people who still invoice them.
scavenge.message: A forgotten saint token sits behind the candle shelf like it was waiting for a handle with bad timing.
